data.keyword: himalayan salt sole water glass jar with wooden spoon

result.keyword: himalayan salt sole water glass jar with wooden spoon

items.markdown:
Himalayan salt sole water is a concentrated mineral solution made by dissolving pink Himalayan salt crystals in water until it reaches full saturation . To prepare it safely, it is essential to use a **glass jar** and **non-metal utensils** (like a wooden or plastic spoon) because metal can react with the salt and leach into the solution.[[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-OXbwyba4Mg&t=143)[[2]](https://www.santmira.com/product-page/himalayan-pink-salt-sole-in-a-jar-with-a-wooden-spoon-100-pure-and-natural#:~:text=Himalayan%20Pink%20Salt%20Sole%20in,noticeable%20hair%20and%20nail%20growth.)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:5102097678769334292,catalogid:17919584854081478818,gpcid:9861211380275740383,mid:576462408274541442&ibp=oshop)

Recommended Sole Water Kits

These kits include the necessary glass jar, wooden spoon, and Himalayan salt stones to get started:[[1]](https://www.etsy.com/listing/856808690/himalayan-rock-salt-sole-crystals#:~:text=The%20SOLE%20JAR%20KIT%20is,gargling%2C%20and%20endless%20purifying%20uses.)[[2]](https://on1y.in/himalayan-pink-salt-uses-health-benefits/#:~:text=You%20can%20dissolve%20Himalayan%20%28%20The%20Himalayas,the%20metal%2C%20which%20will%20contaminate%20your%20Sole.)[[3]](https://handandstone.ca/5-ways-to-use-himalayan-salt-stones/#:~:text=A%20natural%20alternative%20to%20chemical-based%2C%20traditional%20deodorants,desired%20areas%20thoroughly.%20Dry%20stone%20when%20finished.)

- **[Himalayan Salt Stones & Jar for Sole (Mochi-Hchu)](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:4167061143210441340,headlineOfferDocid:13020368982227250534,productDocid:13020368982227250534&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwianfDeoaSTAxXfGtAFHT7LGMwQxa4PegQIBRAC)** : This complete set includes a wide-mouth glass jar pre-filled with Himalayan crystal stones and a handcrafted **wooden spoon** made from natural Schima superba wood.
	- **Price** : $24.99 at [Mochi-Hchu](https://www.mochihchu.com/products/himalayan-salt-stones-jar-for-sole).
- **[Sole Glass Jar with Spoon & Coarse Salt (Saltability)](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:1067607832348962065,gpcid:4932665284094395696,headlineOfferDocid:7458699115168943693,catalogid:1716456939716137552,productDocid:6640236860356454382&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwianfDeoaSTAxXfGtAFHT7LGMwQxa4PegQIBRAH)** : A stylish, reusable glass jar filled with approximately 5 oz of premium coarse Himalayan salt. It features a convenient **wooden spoon** that attaches to the side of the jar for easy storage.
	- **Price** : $20.00 at [Saltability](https://www.saltability.com/products/himalayan-salt-sole-chunks).
- **The Original Himalayan Crystal Salt Stones - Sole Jar (Groceryeshop)** : This kit uses 12 oz of hand-mined pink salt stones and a wide glass jar with a cork lid to prevent dust while maintaining the salt's structure. It includes a high-quality **wooden spoon**.
	- **Price**: $45.84 $32.09 at [Groceryeshop](https://groceryeshop.us/products/original-himalayan-crystal-salt-stones-in-sole-jar?variant=51173669339453&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic).
- **Himalayan Pink Salt Sole Chunks in Jar (Aura Salt Cave)** : This set comes with a glass jar, lid, wooden spoon, and 6 oz of pure salt chunks formed 250 million years ago. The provided spoon measures out a 1/4 teaspoon serving.
	- **Price** : Available at [Aura Salt Cave](https://aurasaltcave.com/products/sole-with-jar-and-spoon).[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13020368982227250534&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13020368982227250534&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6640236860356454382,catalogid:1716456939716137552,gpcid:4932665284094395696&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.saltability.com/products/himalayan-salt-sole-chunks?srsltid=AfmBOoqebId5gBewD0YlEzP1XHXzX3YDzRFtLTTv5r5Ii3b6GwnyQa1H#:~:text=Balances%20the%20body's%20pH%20levels,be%20returned%20at%20customer's%20expense.)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:5102097678769334292,catalogid:17919584854081478818,gpcid:9861211380275740383,mid:576462408274541442&ibp=oshop)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:5102097678769334292,catalogid:17919584854081478818,gpcid:9861211380275740383,mid:576462408274541442&ibp=oshop)[[7]](https://aurasaltcave.com/products/sole-with-jar-and-spoon#:~:text=We%20are%20providing%20salt%20chunks,metal%20utensils/objects%20with%20sole.)

How to Prepare and Use Sole Water

1. **Fill the Jar** : Place salt stones in the glass jar until it is about 1/4 full.
2. **Add Water** : Fill the rest of the jar with filtered or spring water, ensuring the salt is completely covered.
3. **Saturate** : Let it sit for **12 to 24 hours** without stirring. The solution is ready when some undissolved salt remains at the bottom, indicating the water cannot hold any more salt.
4. **Dosage** : Each morning, use your **wooden spoon** to add 1 teaspoon of the sole solution to an 8 oz glass of plain water and drink it on an empty stomach.[[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-OXbwyba4Mg&t=143)[[2]](https://www.instagram.com/reel/C2rplEGLZ-F/)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:985986198204165702&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:13020368982227250534&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:6559899642471366856&ibp=oshop)

Why Use Glass and Wood?

- **Avoid Contamination** : Metal lids or spoons can leach harmful substances into the solution and may rust over time.
- **Preserve Purity** : Natural materials like cork, glass, and wood help maintain the molecular structure and "biodynamic energy" of the salt stones.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:5102097678769334292,catalogid:17919584854081478818,gpcid:9861211380275740383,mid:576462408274541442&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-OXbwyba4Mg&t=143)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:5102097678769334292,catalogid:17919584854081478818,gpcid:9861211380275740383,mid:576462408274541442&ibp=oshop)

Are you looking for a **specific size** of jar for your kitchen counter, or would you like to see **bulk replacement salt stones** for a jar you already own?
